title: postal-v1
description: Postal service contract v1 — 21 operations across postage calculation, shipping, tracking, and locations.

operations.name: postcode_search
operations.description: Search postcodes and suburbs by name or code

operations.name: domestic_services
operations.description: List available domestic parcel services for a route and parcel size

operations.name: domestic_calculate
operations.description: Calculate domestic parcel postage for a specific service

operations.name: international_services
operations.description: List available international parcel services for a country and weight

operations.name: international_calculate
operations.description: Calculate international parcel postage for a specific service

operations.name: letter_services
operations.description: List available letter services (domestic or international)

operations.name: letter_calculate
operations.description: Calculate letter postage cost

operations.name: parcel_sizes
operations.description: Standard parcel box dimensions reference data

operations.name: country_list
operations.description: List countries with ISO codes for international postage

operations.name: locations
operations.description: Find post offices, parcel lockers, and collection points

operations.name: track
operations.description: Track parcels by tracking ID with event history

operations.name: validate_address
operations.description: Validate a postal address (suburb, state, postcode)

operations.name: get_shipments
operations.description: List or retrieve shipments by ID or status

operations.name: get_order
operations.description: Get order details by ID

operations.name: account
operations.description: Get commercial account details and available products

operations.name: get_prices
operations.description: Get contract-rate pricing for items

operations.name: get_labels
operations.description: Check label generation status and get download URL

operations.name: create_shipment
operations.description: Create a domestic or international shipment

operations.name: create_order
operations.description: Finalise shipments into an order for despatch (may be irreversible)

operations.name: create_labels
operations.description: Generate shipping labels for shipments

operations.name: delete_item
operations.description: Delete an item from a shipment before order creation
